CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,356.71 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BASA. ELIAS B. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-07-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-23-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR TRIAL AND TO CURE SERVICE DEFECT. PLTF. ACCEPTS SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CALIM IN OPEN COURT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASA. ELIAS B. JR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BASA. ELIAS B. JR. $1,846.80 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,896.80, THE COURT DETERMINES DEFENDANT AND CROSS-PLAINTIF DAMAGES TO BE $2172.71 AND ATTRIBUTES 15% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDANT'S DRIVER. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
